prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic fine art editorial portrait of the same woman sitting gracefully on a minimalist chair in a peaceful pose with her eyes gently open. She wears a luxurious monochrome ivory-white outfit consisting of an oversized hooded jacket, relaxed jogger pants, and elegant white combat boots. Her hair is styled in a soft messy bun with a few delicate strands framing her face naturally.
Behind and around her, create a large translucent artistic double-exposure silhouette of the same woman, appearing as if she is sketching or designing with a pencil. Blend the silhouette seamlessly with flowing hand-drawn graphite lines, geometric construction sketches, architectural blueprints, crystalline glass shards, translucent polygons, floating fragments, and delicate teal-blue abstract shapes.
The artwork should feel like imagination becoming reality, where thoughts transform into elegant geometric structures. Add subtle gold accents, ink splashes, fine pencil strokes, transparent glass textures, and floating particles. The background should remain clean matte white with abundant negative space, creating a premium museum-quality contemporary art aesthetic.
Soft diffused daylight, high-key lighting, ultra-realistic skin texture, dreamy atmosphere, cinematic depth of field, luxury editorial fashion photography, abstract mixed-media illustration, crystal-inspired composition, masterpiece, award-winning contemporary art, 8K HDR, hyper-detailed, elegant color palette of white, soft teal, pale gray, and subtle gold, vertical 9:16.
Negative Prompt: altered face, different hairstyle, different expression, cartoon, anime, CGI, extra limbs, duplicate person, low quality, blurry, oversaturated colors, watermark, text, logo, bad anatomy, deformed hands, cropped body, dark background, unrealistic proportions.
promptEn:
Create an ultra-realistic fine art editorial portrait of the same woman sitting gracefully on a minimalist chair in a peaceful pose with her eyes gently open. She wears a luxurious monochrome ivory-white outfit consisting of an oversized hooded jacket, relaxed jogger pants, and elegant white combat boots. Her hair is styled in a soft messy bun with a few delicate strands framing her face naturally.
Behind and around her, create a large translucent artistic double-exposure silhouette of the same woman, appearing as if she is sketching or designing with a pencil. Blend the silhouette seamlessly with flowing hand-drawn graphite lines, geometric construction sketches, architectural blueprints, crystalline glass shards, translucent polygons, floating fragments, and delicate teal-blue abstract shapes.
The artwork should feel like imagination becoming reality, where thoughts transform into elegant geometric structures. Add subtle gold accents, ink splashes, fine pencil strokes, transparent glass textures, and floating particles. The background should remain clean matte white with abundant negative space, creating a premium museum-quality contemporary art aesthetic.
Soft diffused daylight, high-key lighting, ultra-realistic skin texture, dreamy atmosphere, cinematic depth of field, luxury editorial fashion photography, abstract mixed-media illustration, crystal-inspired composition, masterpiece, award-winning contemporary art, 8K HDR, hyper-detailed, elegant color palette of white, soft teal, pale gray, and subtle gold, vertical 9:16.

promptZh:
创作一张超写实的美术编辑肖像，画面中的同一位女性优雅地坐在极简风格的椅子上，姿态宁静，双眼微睁。她身穿奢华的单色 象牙白 服装，包括一件超大号连帽夹克、宽松慢跑裤和优雅的白色战靴。她的头发梳成柔和凌乱的发髻，几缕发丝自然地垂在脸颊两侧。
在她身后及周围，创作一个巨大的半透明艺术双重曝光剪影，剪影中的她仿佛正在用铅笔素描或设计。将剪影与流畅的手绘石墨线条、几何构造草图、建筑蓝图、晶莹的玻璃碎片、半透明多边形、漂浮的碎片以及精致的青蓝色抽象形状无缝融合。
这件艺术品应呈现出“想象变为现实”的质感，思想转化为优雅的几何结构。添加微妙的金色点缀、墨水飞溅、细腻的铅笔笔触、透明的玻璃质感以及漂浮的微粒。背景应保持干净的哑光白色，留有充足的负空间，营造出高级博物馆级的当代艺术美感。
柔和的漫射日光，高调照明，超写实的皮肤纹理，梦幻氛围，电影级景深，奢华编辑时尚摄影，抽象混合媒介插画，水晶灵感构图，杰作，屡获殊荣的当代艺术，8K HDR，超精细，白色、柔和青色、浅灰色和微妙金色的优雅配色方案，垂直 9:16。
负面提示词：改变面部，不同发型，不同表情，卡通，动漫，CGI，多余肢体，重复人物，低质量，模糊，色彩过饱和，水印，文字，标志，不良解剖结构，畸形手部，身体裁剪，深色背景，不现实的比例。
